results.name: birthing pod
results.description: Derived from the titular card, this refers to the ability that allows to sacrifice a permanent, search your library for another permanent with a converted mana cost either in relation to the sacrificed permanent or the mana you paid, and put it on the battlefield.

results.name: bisexual lighting
results.description: Pink and blue lighting on a scene. Doesn't necessarily imply bisexuality; the name comes from the resemblance of the colors to the bisexual pride flag.
